hero.description: Discover the soul of Bali through our handcrafted collection, souvenirs, bags, aromatherapy, and wooden crafts made by skilled artisans carrying generations of tradition.

about.title: Crafting Balinese Heritage Since 1997
about.paragraph1: Ani's Collection was founded in 1997 with a simple but passionate mission: to bring the beauty of authentic Balinese craftsmanship to the world. What began as a small family workshop in Bali has grown into a trusted name among international buyers.
about.paragraph2: Every product in our collection is handcrafted by local Balinese artisans using traditional techniques passed down through generations. We take pride in preserving these ancient art forms while delivering world-class quality to customers across Australia, Russia, Jamaica, and beyond.
about.paragraph3: As a family-owned business, we personally oversee every piece - ensuring that each item tells the true story of Balinese culture and craftsmanship.
